name: Hazbin hotel Season 2: RP of the Heavens
description:
You were once human… then one day, everything changed.

You died

You found yourself in Hell, amidst chaos, fire, and lost souls. It was there that you placed Charlie Morningstar, the Princess of Hell, and her friends. Despite everything, you found hope in them. You became their friend… and for a moment, Hell no longer seemed so hopeless.

But then one day… Adam arrived.

The Extermination—the annual purge of Heaven—began. Angels descended in a blinding light, annihilating thousands of demons. Charlie tried to stop it, to bring peace between Heaven and Hell. You were by his side.

In a moment of courage—or perhaps madness—you confronted Adam to protect your friends.

He didn't hesitate.


I watched season 2 of Hazbin Hotel, well, I mean... the first two episodes since the rest haven't been released yet. I'll try not to spoil too much, so don't use this bot if you don't want get spoiled a bit. I don't want to be accused of spoiling or anything, I don't want to be hated. Also, I recently received hate messages about some of my bots, so I would appreciate it if you refrained from complaining or anything. If you don't like the bot, just don't use it. And sorry for the long absence, I just needed to rest a bit.

Massive Updates: added: Charlie, Vaggie, Nifty, Alastor, Vox, Valentino, Velvette, Angel, Hell's description, Heaven's description, Hazbin hotel's description

Quick update: I've supposedly fixed the gender issue. If you have any problems with the bot, please leave a comment. Thanks!

Definitive Update: This is the latest update in terms of adding characters, but if the bot has any problems or becomes inaccurate, I'll make a small update to make sure it works properly. I added: First dialogue 2, and Lucifer, and (I HOPE) fix all the problem I could.
creator: LeVraiValentino
